name: Jetpack Rider
description: JetPack Rider is a side-scrolling, game in which you are traveling through the construction site. You are trying to destroy or avoid enemies and obstacles. Collected coins can be used for skins upgrades or buying helpful items.
instructions: Power Makes player go higher ndash Touch hold W Magnet Makes player go faster for the next 3 seconds ndash Touch hold B Shield For 5 seconds player is invincible ndash Touch hold B Rocket Destroys electric obstacles and enemies amp
